response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-adjacent work, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated production GenAI delivery, no explicit RAG/vector database experience, no Python depth shown, and limited evidence of customer-facing technical-discovery leadership at the Staff FDE level. The AI/GenAI experience appears recent and shallow relative to an 8+ year production-AI requirement.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js and distributed systems experience
Current exposure to MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Proven technical leadership through workshops, talks, and mentoring (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses)
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of production GenAI/AI solution delivery
Resume does not show Python, vector databases, or RAG architecture experience
No clear evidence of customer-facing discovery or enterprise integration leadership
